generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure serving as a cyber-physical representation for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations"
    base:contains LightingSubsystem, HVACSubsystem, TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, LightingControllerActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor for temperature measurements integrated into BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor for occupancy detection integrated into BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor for light level measurements integrated into BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting control systems defined within BIM models for automated execution of control signals"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC systems defined within BIM models for automated execution of control signals"
]

instance LightingSubsystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular lighting subsystem integrated via centralized DT Framework"
]

instance HVACSubsystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular HVAC subsystem integrated via centralized DT Framework"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensor data for BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy sensor data for BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level sensor data for BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with runtime metadata for BCS components containing geometric, spatial, functional characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion of sensor data from Building Control Systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management enabling bidirectional communication and synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortOptimizationService, NonVisualHealthEffectBalancingService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for geometric and spatial model creation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelGenerationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated artifact generation and runtime interface creation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelGenerationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for operational scenarios using BIM model and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for facility management decisions based on historical and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityManagementDecision
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy consumption optimization using reinforcement learning algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort optimization based on light level and occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortOptimizationInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectBalancingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect balancing through environmental parameter optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectBalancingInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ModelGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated BIM model artifact generation using model-driven engineering"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelGeneratedInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems for continuous monitoring"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building performance scenarios"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for energy consumption reduction through reinforcement learning"
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for visual comfort based on light level and occupancy data"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectBalancingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for non-visual health effects through environmental parameter balancing"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building operations for operational awareness"
]

instance ModelGeneratedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated BIM model artifact for digital twin representation"
]

instance FacilityManagementDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven facility management decisions based on predictive analytics and real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin and sent to BCS actuators (e.g., lighting, HVAC) through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time physical system adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange and immediate response to physical system changes, as evidenced by bidirectional communication protocols and ODTE metric evaluation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework orchestrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular services through standardized extension points, with roles for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, refurbishment, and adaptations, leveraging BIM as a semantic backbone throughout."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric for interoperability and architectural soundness; synchronization techniques address semantic drift to maintain model-physical alignment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional real-time communication via Eclipse Hono (IoT data ingestion) and Eclipse Ditto (digital twin state management) for secure data exchange between physical assets and virtual representations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM (Building Information Modeling) standards as the primary AECO-specific standard, with the framework's modeling methodology designed to standardize BIM semantics for consistent runtime artifact generation."
]
